summary: Complete testing of Screening Hub page. All 14 backend API tests pass. All frontend UI flows working correctly including New Screening modal, animated progress, result card, filters, search, pagination, View and Rescreen functionality.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/screenings returns paginated list with 30+ seeded records
Backend: GET /api/screenings page 2 returns more records
Backend: GET /api/screenings with risk_level=HIGH filter works correctly
Backend: GET /api/screenings with risk_level=LOW filter works correctly
Backend: GET /api/screenings with search filter by name works
Backend: Screening records have all required fields (id, full_name, risk_score, risk_level, status, checks_run, created_at)
Backend: POST /api/screenings/run with basic data returns screening result
Backend: POST /api/screenings/run with all checks (kyc, sanctions, pep, adverse_media) returns complete result
Backend: POST /api/screenings/run without fullName returns 400
Backend: POST /api/screenings/run persists record and can be fetched by ID
Backend: GET /api/screenings/{id} returns single screening record
Backend: GET /api/screenings/{id} with invalid ID returns 404
Backend: Screening result has correct structure (sanctions_result.status, pep_result.status, matched_entities)
Backend: High-risk country (IR) increases risk score
Frontend: Login with shyam@sentrixai.com / Sentrix@2024 works
Frontend: Screening page shows 'Screening' title
Frontend: 'New Screening' button visible at top right
Frontend: Search input visible and functional
Frontend: Filter buttons (All, LOW, MEDIUM, HIGH, CRITICAL) visible and functional
Frontend: HIGH filter correctly shows only HIGH risk records (5 records)
Frontend: History table shows 37 records with columns: Name, ID Type, Score, Risk Level, Checks, Date, Status, Actions
Frontend: Risk level badges are color-coded (LOW=green, MEDIUM=yellow, HIGH=red, CRITICAL=dark-red)
Frontend: New Screening modal opens with all fields (Full Name, DOB, Nationality dropdown, ID Type select, ID Number)
Frontend: Modal has 4 check toggles (KYC, Sanctions, PEP, Adverse Media)
Frontend: KYC toggle is disabled until ID Type is selected
Frontend: Run Screening button submits form and closes modal
Frontend: Animated progress panel appears with steps getting green checkmarks
Frontend: Progress shows: Sanctions Check Complete, PEP Screening Complete, Risk Score Calculated
Frontend: Final result card shows large risk score circle (40/100 for MEDIUM)
Frontend: Result card shows risk level badge (MEDIUM with yellow color)
Frontend: Result card shows check breakdown (KYC: FAILED, Sanctions: CLEAR, PEP: CLEAR, Adverse Media: HITS_FOUND)
Frontend: 'Create Investigation Case' button appears for MEDIUM+ risk
Frontend: View button on table row shows result card at top with screening details
Frontend: Rescreen button opens modal pre-filled with person's data
Frontend: Pagination works - page 2 shows more records with realistic Indian names
seed_data_creation: 30 demo screening records seeded on startup with realistic Indian names (Aarav Sharma, Priya Patel, Rohan Gupta, etc.) and mixed risk levels
context_for_next_testing_agent: Screening Hub page fully tested. Features verified: New Screening modal with all form fields, animated progress panel (600ms per step), final result card with SVG risk score circle, check breakdown, matched entities display, Create Investigation Case button for MEDIUM+ risk, history table with 30+ seeded records, filters (All/LOW/MEDIUM/HIGH/CRITICAL), search by name, pagination, View and Rescreen actions. Backend endpoints: GET /api/screenings (paginated, filterable), POST /api/screenings/run (persists result), GET /api/screenings/{id}. Signzy KYC and OpenSanctions are in MOCK/DEMO mode.

mocked_apis.signzy_service.py: KYC verification (PAN, Aadhaar, Passport, Voter ID, DL) returns mock results

result_card.risk_score_circle: SVG with 0-100 score, color-coded by level
result_card.create_case_button: Visible for MEDIUM, HIGH, CRITICAL risk levels
